config.script:
#include "50100" #include "50207" #include "50122" #include "50126" ' co wybrano const SEL_TEXT_ALL = 1 ' Wszystko const SEL_TEXT_EX = 2 ' Dokładnie const SEL_TEXT_BEG = 3 ' Początek const SEL_TEXT_CON = 4 ' Zawiera const SEL_TEXT_RAN = 5 ' Zakres ' zakres od...do const IDS_SCALE = 100 ' mnożnik identyfikatorów const OFFSET_EQUAL = 1 ' kontrolka "Dokladnie" const OFFSET_FROM = 2 ' kontrolka "Od" const OFFSET_BEGIN = 3 ' kontrolka "Początek" const OFFSET_TO = 4 ' kontrolka "Do" const OFFSET_DESC = 5 ' kontrolka z opisem const OFFSET_CONT = 6 ' kontrolka "Zawiera" const OFFSET_ENUM = 10 ' pozycja startowa checkboxów pola enum const OFFSET_TEXT_FROM = 1 ' tekst "Od" const OFFSET_TEXT_TO = 3 ' tekst "Do" ' co wybrano const SEL_DATE_ALL = 1 ' Dowolna data const SEL_DATE_YEAR = 2 ' Bieżący rok const SEL_DATE_MONTH = 3 ' Bieżący miesiąc const SEL_DATE_TODAY = 4 ' Dzisiaj const SEL_DATE_EARLY = 5 ' Zakres const SEL_DATE_LATER = 6 ' Zakres const SEL_DATE_RAN = 7 ' Zakres ' co wybrano const SEL_CUR_ALL = 1 ' Dowolna wartość const SEL_CUR_SUP = 2 ' Powyżej const SEL_CUR_SUB = 3 ' Poniżej const SEL_CUR_EQ = 4 ' Równe const SEL_CUR_RAN = 5 ' Zakres ' co wybrano const SEL_TIME_ALL = 1 ' Dowolna godzina const SEL_TIME_SUP = 2 ' Powyżej const SEL_TIME_SUB = 3 ' Poniżej const SEL_TIME_EQ = 4 ' Równe const SEL_TIME_RAN = 5 ' Zakres ' co wybrano przy operacji z lista obiektow const SEL_LIST_NO = 1 ' bez operacji z lista const SEL_LIST_IN = 2 ' nalezy do listy const SEL_LIST_NOT_IN= 3 ' nie nalezy do listy const SEL_LIST_ID = 4 ' IdObj Listy const SEL_LIST_DISP = 5 ' Wyswietla nazwe listy const SEL_LIST_DISP2 = 6 ' Wyswietla nazwe listy 2 dim pTabsIDS dim pDescrCtrlsIds dim lastID:lastID = TABS_CTRLS_FIRST_ID + 1 function add_tabid(byval strName) pTabsIDS.add(lastID) add_tabid = lastID if bTabs then addAdditionalFopenInstr("pGlobalTabMan.addtab TABS_CTRLS_FIRST_ID , "+ cstr(lastID) + ", """ + strName + """" + vbNewLine) end if lastID = lastID + 1 end function function get_descrctrlids() set get_descrctrlids = pDescrCtrlsIds end function function get_tabs() set get_tabs = pTabsIDS end function dim bTabs:bTabs = true dim bSilent:bSilent = false function make_tabs(byval bMake ) bTabs = bMake end function function silent(byval value ) bSilent = value end function '-------------------------------------------------------------------------- 'metody prywatne '-------------------------------------------------------------------------- '-------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' ' Funkcja tworzy pełny opis pola (również referencji) ' '-------------------------------------------------------------------------- function compose_name(byval strCP) dim str dim PathArray : PathArray = split(strCP,";") dim iter dim TypeId : TypeId = PathArray(ubound(PathArray)-1) dim FldName : FldName = PathArray(ubound(PathArray)) with doc_.stdobjdef.getobjdef(TypeId) str = .field(.getfieldindex(FldName)).HumanName + " (z " + .HumanName end with for iter = ubound(PathArray)-2 to 0 step -2 TypeId = PathArray(iter-1) str = str + " w " + doc_.stdobjdef.getobjdef(TypeId).HumanName next compose_name = str + ")" end function '-------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' ' czy wyświetlać okno dialogowe filtru (zwraca true lub false) ' ' Parametry: ' [in] pSTO - definicja wyszukiwania (obiekt typu TYPEID_SEARCHTYPE) ' [in] strButtons - definicja wyświetlanych klawiszy w formacie ;;..., ' '-------------------------------------------------------------------------- function can_show_filter(byref pSTO, byval strButtons) ' klawisze dynamiczne dim aBtnText:aBtnText = split(strButtons, ";", -1, 1) if (not g_pAdditionalCtrl is nothing) then if (g_pAdditionalCtrl.Count()>0) then can_show_filter = true exit function end if end if if (g_strAdditionalPageScript<>"") then can_show_filter = true exit function end if ' jeśli nie istnieje żadne kryterium wyszukiwania i jest jeden klawisz if (not pSTO.listFilter.exists(1) and ubound(aBtnText)=0) then can_show_filter = false else dim pSTOItem dim bCanShow:bCanShow=false for each pSTOItem in pSTO.listFilter if pSTOItem.SearchTypeItem_getselectiontype()<>0 then bCanShow=true end if next can_show_filter = bCanShow end if end function '-------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' ' Funkcja generuje skrypt/formularz filtrujący tekst ' '-------------------------------------------------------------------------- private function build_text_section(byref pSO,byref pSTO,byval nPos,byval bScript) if bScript then ' opis wybranych rzeczy pSO.write "function desc"+cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE)+"(newValue)" + vbCrLf pSO.write " dim strName:strName=page_.ctrl("+cstr(nPos*1000)+").text" + vbCrLf pSO.write " dim strDesc" + vbCrLf pSO.write " dim strFrom:strFrom="""""""" + page_.ctrl("+cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE+OFFSET_FROM)+").text + """"""""" + vbCrLf pSO.write " dim strTo:strTo="""""""" + page_.ctrl("+cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE+OFFSET_TO)+").text + """"""""" + vbCrLf pSO.write " dim strEqual:strEqual="""""""" + page_.ctrl("+cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE+OFFSET_EQUAL)+").text + """"""""" + vbCrLf pSO.write " dim strCont:strCont="""""""" + page_.ctrl("+cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE+OFFSET_CONT)+").text + """"""""" + vbCrLf pSO.write " dim strBegin:strBegin="""""""" + page_.ctrl("+cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE+OFFSET_BEGIN)+").text + """"""""" + vbCrLf pSO.write " if clng(newValue)=" + cstr(SEL_TEXT_ALL) + " then" + vbCrLf pSO.write " strDesc=""Dowolny napis""" + vbCrLf pSO.write " elseif clng(newValue)="+cstr(SEL_TEXT_EX)+" then" + vbCrLf pSO.write " strDesc=strName + "" równa się "" + strEqual " + vbCrLf pSO.write " elseif clng(newValue)="+cstr(SEL_TEXT_CON)+ " then" + vbCrLf pSO.write " strDesc=strName + "" zawiera "" + strCont" + vbCrLf pSO.write " elseif clng(newValue)="+cstr(SEL_TEXT_BEG)+ " then" + vbCrLf pSO.write " strDesc=strName + "" rozpoczyna się od "" + strBegin" + vbCrLf pSO.write " elseif clng(newValue)=" + cstr(SEL_TEXT_RAN) + " then" + vbCrLf pSO.write " strDesc=strName +"" zawiera się pomiędzy "" + strFrom + "" i "" + strTo" + vbCrLf pSO.write " else" + vbCrLf pSO.write " strDesc=""hmm... cos nie tak..."" " + vbCrLf pSO.write " end if" + vbCrLf pSO.write " page_.ctrl("+cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE+OFFSET_DESC)+").text=strDesc" + vbCrLf pSO.write "end function" + vbCrLf 'edit od pSO.write "function c" + cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE+OFFSET_FROM) + "_ondataentered(oCtrl, newValue)" + vbCrLf pSO.write "end function" + vbCrLf + vbCrLf pSO.write "function c" + cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE+OFFSET_FROM) + "_ongetdata(byref oCtrl)" + vbCrLf pSO.write " desc"+cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE)+"(page_.ctrl("+cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE)+").value)" + vbCrLf pSO.write " c" + cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE+OFFSET_FROM) + "_ongetdata=true" + vbCrLf pSO.write "end function" + vbCrLf 'edit do pSO.write "function c" + cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE+OFFSET_TO) + "_ondataentered(oCtrl, newValue)" + vbCrLf pSO.write "end function" + vbCrLf + vbCrLf pSO.write "function c" + cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE+OFFSET_TO) + "_ongetdata(byref oCtrl)" + vbCrLf pSO.write " desc"+cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE)+"(page_.ctrl("+cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE)+").value)" + vbCrLf pSO.write " c" + cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE+OFFSET_TO) + "_ongetdata=true" + vbCrLf pSO.write "end function" + vbCrLf 'edit equal pSO.write "function c" + cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE+OFFSET_EQUAL) + "_ondataentered(oCtrl, newValue)" + vbCrLf pSO.write "end function" + vbCrLf + vbCrLf pSO.write "function c" + cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE+OFFSET_EQUAL) + "_ongetdata(byref oCtrl)" + vbCrLf pSO.write " desc"+cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE)+"(page_.ctrl("+cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE)+").value)" + vbCrLf pSO.write " c" + cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE+OFFSET_EQUAL) + "_ongetdata=true" + vbCrLf pSO.write "end function" + vbCrLf 'edit begin pSO.write "function c" + cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE+OFFSET_BEGIN) + "_ondataentered(oCtrl, newValue)" + vbCrLf pSO.write "end function" + vbCrLf + vbCrLf pSO.write "function c" + cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE+OFFSET_BEGIN) + "_ongetdata(byref oCtrl)" + vbCrLf pSO.write " desc"+cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE)+"(page_.ctrl("+cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE)+").value)" + vbCrLf pSO.write " c" + cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE+OFFSET_BEGIN) + "_ongetdata=true" + vbCrLf pSO.write "end function" + vbCrLf 'edit contain pSO.write "function c" + cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE+OFFSET_CONT) + "_ondataentered(oCtrl, newValue)" + vbCrLf pSO.write "end function" + vbCrLf + vbCrLf pSO.write "function c" + cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE+OFFSET_CONT) + "_ongetdata(byref oCtrl)" + vbCrLf pSO.write " desc"+cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE)+"(page_.ctrl("+cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE)+").value)" + vbCrLf pSO.write " c" + cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE+OFFSET_CONT) + "_ongetdata=true" + vbCrLf pSO.write "end function" + vbCrLf 'radio pSO.write "function c" + cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE) + "_ondataentered(oCtrl, newValue)" + vbCrLf pSO.write " c" + cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE) + "_ondataentered=true" + vbCrLf pSO.write " dim oTmp" + vbCrLf pSO.write " dim bEnableFrom:bEnableFrom=false" + vbCrLf pSO.write " dim bEnableTo:bEnableTo=false" + vbCrLf pSO.write " dim bEnableEqual:bEnableEqual=false" + vbCrLf pSO.write " dim bEnableBegin:bEnableBegin=false" + vbCrLf pSO.write " dim bEnableCont:bEnableCont=false" + vbCrLf pSO.write " if clng(newValue)=" + cstr(SEL_TEXT_ALL) + " then" + vbCrLf pSO.write " elseif clng(newValue)="+cstr(SEL_TEXT_EX)+" then" + vbCrLf pSO.write " bEnableEqual=true" + vbCrLf pSO.write " elseif clng(newValue)="+cstr(SEL_TEXT_CON)+ " then" + vbCrLf pSO.write " bEnableCont=true" + vbCrLf pSO.write " elseif clng(newValue)="+cstr(SEL_TEXT_BEG)+ " then" + vbCrLf pSO.write " bEnableBegin=true" + vbCrLf pSO.write " elseif clng(newValue)=" + cstr(SEL_TEXT_RAN) + " then" + vbCrLf pSO.write " bEnableFrom=true" + vbCrLf pSO.write " bEnableTo=true" + vbCrLf pSO.write " else" + vbCrLf pSO.write " end if" + vbCrLf 'show/hide controls pSO.write " page_.ctrl(" + cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE+OFFSET_EQUAL) + ").disable=not bEnableEqual" + vbCrLf pSO.write " page_.ctrl(" + cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE+OFFSET_FROM) + ").disable=not bEnableFrom" + vbCrLf pSO.write " page_.ctrl(" + cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE+OFFSET_CONT) + ").disable=not bEnableCont" + vbCrLf pSO.write " page_.ctrl(" + cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE+OFFSET_TO) + ").disable=not bEnableTo" + vbCrLf pSO.write " page_.ctrl(" + cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE+OFFSET_BEGIN) + ").disable=not bEnableBegin" + vbCrLf pSO.write "end function" + vbCrLf + vbCrLf ' _ongetdata pSO.write "function c" + cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE) + "_ongetdata(byref oCtrl)" + vbCrLf pSO.write " desc"+cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE)+"(oCtrl.value)" + vbCrLf pSO.write " c" + cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE) + "_ongetdata=true" + vbCrLf pSO.write "end function" + vbCrLf else dim pSTOI : set pSTOI = pSTO.listFilter.get(nPos) pSO.write vbCrLf + "

" + vbCrLf pSO.write "" + vbCrLf pSO.write "" + vbCrLf pSO.write "" + vbCrLf pSO.write "
" + vbCrLf pDescrCtrlsIds.add(nPos*1000) if not pSTOI is nothing then pSO.write pSTOI.SearchTypeItem_compose_name() pSO.write "
" + vbCrLf pSO.write "" + vbCrLf pSO.write "" + vbCrLf pSO.write "
Wszystko
" + vbCrLf pSO.write "
Dokladnie
" + vbCrLf pSO.write "
Początek
" + vbCrLf pSO.write "
Zawiera
" + vbCrLf pSO.write "
Zakres od do
" + vbCrLf pSO.write "" + vbCrLf pSO.write "
" + vbCrLf pSO.write "
" + vbCrLf pSO.write "
" + vbCrLf pSO.write "
" + vbCrLf pSO.write "

" + vbCrLf end if end if end function '-------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' ' Funkcja generuje skrypt/formularz filtrujący datę ' this year / this month / today / date range ' '-------------------------------------------------------------------------- private function build_date_section(byref pSO,byref pSTO,byval nPos,byval bScript) if bScript then ' opis wbranych rzeczy pSO.write "function desc"+cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE)+"(newValue)" + vbCrLf pSO.write " dim strDesc" + vbCrLf pSO.write " dim strFrom:strFrom= cstr(page_.ctrl("+cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE+OFFSET_FROM)+").value)" + vbCrLf pSO.write " dim strTo:strTo= cstr(page_.ctrl("+cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE+OFFSET_TO)+").value)" + vbCrLf pSO.write " dim strEarly:strEarly= cstr(page_.ctrl("+cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE+OFFSET_EQUAL)+").value)" + vbCrLf pSO.write " dim strLater:strLater= cstr(page_.ctrl("+cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE+OFFSET_CONT)+").value)" + vbCrLf pSO.write " if clng(newValue)=" + cstr(SEL_DATE_ALL) + " then" + vbCrLf pSO.write " strDesc=""Dowolna data""" + vbCrLf pSO.write " elseif clng(newValue)="+cstr(SEL_DATE_YEAR)+" then" + vbCrLf pSO.write " strDesc=""Bieżący rok""" + vbCrLf pSO.write " elseif clng(newValue)="+cstr(SEL_DATE_MONTH)+ " then" + vbCrLf pSO.write " strDesc=""Bieżący miesiąc""" + vbCrLf pSO.write " elseif clng(newValue)="+cstr(SEL_DATE_TODAY)+ " then" + vbCrLf pSO.write " strDesc=""Dzisiaj""" + vbCrLf pSO.write " elseif clng(newValue)=" + cstr(SEL_DATE_RAN) + " then" + vbCrLf pSO.write " strDesc=""Zawiera się pomiędzy "" + strFrom + "" i "" + strTo" + vbCrLf pSO.write " elseif clng(newValue)="+cstr(SEL_DATE_EARLY)+ " then" + vbCrLf pSO.write " strDesc=""Wcześniej niż "" + strEarly" + vbCrLf pSO.write " elseif clng(newValue)="+cstr(SEL_DATE_LATER)+ " then" + vbCrLf pSO.write " strDesc=""Poźniej niż "" + strLater" + vbCrLf pSO.write " else" + vbCrLf pSO.write " strDesc=""hmm... cos nie tak..."" " + vbCrLf pSO.write " end if" + vbCrLf pSO.write " page_.ctrl("+cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE+OFFSET_DESC)+").text=strDesc" + vbCrLf pSO.write "end function" + vbCrLf 'edit od pSO.write "function c" + cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE+OFFSET_FROM) + "_ondataentered(oCtrl, newValue)" + vbCrLf pSO.write "end function" + vbCrLf + vbCrLf pSO.write "function c" + cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE+OFFSET_FROM) + "_ongetdata(byref oCtrl)" + vbCrLf pSO.write " desc"+cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE)+"(page_.ctrl("+cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE)+").value)" + vbCrLf pSO.write " c" + cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE+OFFSET_FROM) + "_ongetdata=true" + vbCrLf pSO.write "end function" + vbCrLf 'edit do pSO.write "function c" + cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE+OFFSET_TO) + "_ondataentered(oCtrl, newValue)" + vbCrLf pSO.write "end function" + vbCrLf + vbCrLf pSO.write "function c" + cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE+OFFSET_TO) + "_ongetdata(byref oCtrl)" + vbCrLf pSO.write " desc"+cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE)+"(page_.ctrl("+cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE)+").value)" + vbCrLf pSO.write " c" + cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE+OFFSET_TO) + "_ongetdata=true" + vbCrLf pSO.write "end function" + vbCrLf 'edit wczesniej niz pSO.write "function c" + cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE+OFFSET_EQUAL) + "_ondataentered(oCtrl, newValue)" + vbCrLf pSO.write "end function" + vbCrLf + vbCrLf pSO.write "function c" + cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE+OFFSET_EQUAL) + "_ongetdata(byref oCtrl)" + vbCrLf pSO.write " desc"+cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE)+"(page_.ctrl("+cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE)+").value)" + vbCrLf pSO.write " c" + cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE+OFFSET_EQUAL) + "_ongetdata=true" + vbCrLf pSO.write "end function" + vbCrLf 'edit pozniej niz pSO.write "function c" + cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE+OFFSET_CONT) + "_ondataentered(oCtrl, newValue)" + vbCrLf pSO.write "end function" + vbCrLf + vbCrLf pSO.write "function c" + cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE+OFFSET_CONT) + "_ongetdata(byref oCtrl)" + vbCrLf pSO.write " desc"+cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE)+"(page_.ctrl("+cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE)+").value)" + vbCrLf pSO.write " c" + cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE+OFFSET_CONT) + "_ongetdata=true" + vbCrLf pSO.write "end function" + vbCrLf pSO.write "function c" + cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE) + "_ondataentered(oCtrl, newValue)" + vbCrLf pSO.write " c" + cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE) + "_ondataentered=true" + vbCrLf pSO.write " dim oTmp" + vbCrLf pSO.write " dim bEnableFrom:bEnableFrom=false" + vbCrLf pSO.write " dim bEnableTo:bEnableTo=false" + vbCrLf pSO.write " dim bEnableEarly:bEnableEarly=false" + vbCrLf pSO.write " dim bEnableLater:bEnableLater=false" + vbCrLf pSO.write " if clng(newValue)=" + cstr(SEL_DATE_RAN) + " then" + vbCrLf pSO.write " bEnableFrom=true" + vbCrLf pSO.write " bEnableTo=true" + vbCrLf pSO.write " elseif clng(newValue)=" + cstr(SEL_DATE_EARLY) + " then" + vbCrLf pSO.write " bEnableEarly=true" + vbCrLf pSO.write " elseif clng(newValue)=" + cstr(SEL_DATE_LATER) + " then" + vbCrLf pSO.write " bEnableLater=true" + vbCrLf pSO.write " else" + vbCrLf pSO.write " end if" + vbCrLf ' show/hide controls pSO.write " page_.ctrl(" + cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE+OFFSET_EQUAL) + ").disable=not bEnableEarly" + vbCrLf pSO.write " page_.ctrl(" + cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE+OFFSET_FROM) + ").disable=not bEnableFrom" + vbCrLf pSO.write " page_.ctrl(" + cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE+OFFSET_CONT) + ").disable=not bEnableLater" + vbCrLf pSO.write " page_.ctrl(" + cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE+OFFSET_TO) + ").disable=not bEnableTo" + vbCrLf pSO.write "end function" + vbCrLf + vbCrLf ' _ongetdata pSO.write "function c" + cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE) + "_ongetdata(byref oCtrl)" + vbCrLf pSO.write " desc"+cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE)+"(oCtrl.value)" + vbCrLf pSO.write " c" + cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE) + "_ongetdata=true" + vbCrLf pSO.write "end function" + vbCrLf else dim pSTOI : set pSTOI = pSTO.listFilter.get(nPos) if not pSTOI is nothing then pSO.write vbCrLf + "

" + vbCrLf pSO.write "" + vbCrLf pSO.write "" + vbCrLf pSO.write "" + vbCrLf pSO.write "
" + vbCrLf pDescrCtrlsIds.add(nPos*1000) pSO.write pSTOI.SearchTypeItem_compose_name() pSO.write "
" + vbCrLf pSO.write "" + vbCrLf pSO.write "" + vbCrLf pSO.write "
Dowolna
" + vbCrLf pSO.write "
Bieżący rok
" + vbCrLf pSO.write "
Bieżący miesiąc
" + vbCrLf pSO.write "
Dzisiaj
" + vbCrLf pSO.write "
Wcześniej niż
" + vbCrLf pSO.write "
Póżniej niż
" + vbCrLf pSO.write "
Od - dodo
" + vbCrLf pSO.write "" + vbCrLf pSO.write "
" + vbCrLf pSO.write "
" + vbCrLf pSO.write "
" + vbCrLf pSO.write "
" + vbCrLf pSO.write "
" + vbCrLf pSO.write "

" + vbCrLf end if end if end function '-------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' ' Funkcja generuje skrypt/formularz filtrujący wartości typu currency ' '-------------------------------------------------------------------------- private function build_currency_section(byref pSO,byref pSTO,byval nPos,byval bScript) if bScript then ' opis wbranych rzeczy pSO.write "function desc"+cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE)+"(newValue)" + vbCrLf pSO.write " dim strDesc" + vbCrLf pSO.write " dim strFrom:strFrom="""""""" + cstr(page_.ctrl("+cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE+OFFSET_FROM)+").value) + """"""""" + vbCrLf pSO.write " dim strTo:strTo="""""""" + cstr(page_.ctrl("+cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE+OFFSET_TO)+").value) + """"""""" + vbCrLf pSO.write " dim strEqual:strEqual="""""""" + cstr(page_.ctrl("+cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE+OFFSET_EQUAL)+").value) + """"""""" + vbCrLf pSO.write " dim strCont:strCont="""""""" + cstr(page_.ctrl("+cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE+OFFSET_CONT)+").value) + """"""""" + vbCrLf pSO.write " dim strBegin:strBegin="""""""" + cstr(page_.ctrl("+cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE+OFFSET_BEGIN)+").value) + """"""""" + vbCrLf pSO.write " if clng(newValue)=" + cstr(SEL_CUR_ALL) + " then" + vbCrLf pSO.write " strDesc=""Dowolna wartość""" + vbCrLf pSO.write " elseif clng(newValue)="+cstr(SEL_CUR_SUB)+" then" + vbCrLf pSO.write " strDesc=""Wartość większa niż "" + strBegin" + vbCrLf pSO.write " elseif clng(newValue)="+cstr(SEL_CUR_SUP)+ " then" + vbCrLf pSO.write " strDesc=""Wartość mniejsza niż "" + strCont" + vbCrLf pSO.write " elseif clng(newValue)="+cstr(SEL_CUR_EQ)+ " then" + vbCrLf pSO.write " strDesc=""WArtość równa "" + strEqual" + vbCrLf pSO.write " elseif clng(newValue)=" + cstr(SEL_CUR_RAN) + " then" + vbCrLf pSO.write " strDesc=""Wartość z zakresu "" + strFrom + "" i "" + strTo" + vbCrLf pSO.write " else" + vbCrLf pSO.write " strDesc=""hmm... cos nie tak..."" " + vbCrLf pSO.write " end if" + vbCrLf pSO.write " page_.ctrl("+cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE+OFFSET_DESC)+").text=strDesc" + vbCrLf pSO.write "end function" + vbCrLf 'edit od pSO.write "function c" + '-------------------------------------------------------------------------- private function build_time_section(byref pSO,byref pSTO,byval nPos,byval bScript) if bScript then ' _ondataentered pSO.write "function c" + cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE) + "_ondataentered(oCtrl, newValue)" + vbCrLf pSO.write " c" + cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE) + "_ondataentered=true" + vbCrLf pSO.write " dim oTmp" + vbCrLf pSO.write " dim bEnableFrom" + vbCrLf pSO.write " dim bEnableTo" + vbCrLf pSO.write " if clng(newValue)=" + cstr(SEL_TIME_ALL) + " then" + vbCrLf pSO.write " bEnableFrom=false" + vbCrLf pSO.write " bEnableTo=false" + vbCrLf pSO.write " elseif clng(newValue)=" + cstr(SEL_TIME_SUP) + " or clng(newValue)=" + cstr(SEL_TIME_SUB) +_ " or clng(newValue)=" + cstr(SEL_TIME_EQ) + " then" + vbCrLf pSO.write " bEnableFrom=true" + vbCrLf pSO.write " bEnableTo=false" + vbCrLf pSO.write " elseif clng(newValue)=" + cstr(SEL_TIME_RAN) + " then" + vbCrLf pSO.write " bEnableFrom=true" + vbCrLf pSO.write " bEnableTo=true" + vbCrLf pSO.write " else" + vbCrLf pSO.write " bEnableFrom=false" + vbCrLf pSO.write " bEnableTo=false" + vbCrLf pSO.write " end if" + vbCrLf ' show/hide controls 'pSO.write " page_.ctrl(" + cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE+OFFSET_TEXT_FROM) + ").disable=not bEnableFrom" + vbCrLf pSO.write " page_.ctrl(" + cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE+OFFSET_FROM) + ").disable=not bEnableFrom" + vbCrLf 'pSO.write " page_.ctrl(" + cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE+OFFSET_TEXT_TO) + ").disable=not bEnableTo" + vbCrLf pSO.write " page_.ctrl(" + cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE+OFFSET_TO) + ").disable=not bEnableTo" + vbCrLf pSO.write "end function" + vbCrLf + vbCrLf ' _ongetdata pSO.write "function c" + cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE) + "_ongetdata(byref oCtrl)" + vbCrLf pSO.write " c" + cstr(nPos*IDS_SCALE) + "_ongetdata=true" + vbCrLf pSO.write "end function" + vbCrLf else dim pSTOI : set pSTOI = pSTO.listFilter.get(nPos) if not pSTOI is nothing then pSO.write vbCrLf + "

" + vbCrLf pSO.write "" + vbCrLf pSO.write "" + vbCrLf pSO.write "" + vbCrLf pSO.write "
